exclusions: No changes to user-visible interaction flow
No changes to discover.json output schema
existing_assets: 6 sub-skills (mode-detection, idea-intake, completeness, ui-taste, artifact-writer, critic-supervisor)

selected_direction.rationale: feature mode — direction inherited from existing codebase

design_philosophy.principle: Main agent is a conversation router, not a compute engine
design_philosophy.justification: User confirmed subagent-first approach: all heavy computation runs in isolated subagent context, main agent only handles user dialogue + dispatch + summary presentation

design_philosophy.principle: Subagent gets full context, main agent gets minimal summary
design_philosophy.justification: User insight: we don't care about subagent context overflow, only main agent budget matters. Subagent reads full artifacts, returns structured summary.
User rejected silent fallback. On subagent failure: stop, report, ask user retry-or-fallback.

tech_direction.product_impact: Discover runs on 256K context models without compression, same UX and output
tech_direction.rationale: Pure skill-layer change, no new runtime dependencies, three-platform compatible via each platform's native subagent mechanism

entities.name: DispatchContract
entities.description: Standardized declaration of subagent task: input files, output file, output summary format and max size

entities.name: ContextBudget
entities.description: Per-stage context allocation target for main agent, declared in SKILL.md header

relationships.description: Each delegatable stage embeds a dispatch contract as HTML comment
Contract may reference sub-skill file for subagent to load
Budget sets max output_summary size for each contract

non_functional_requirements.description: Main agent context consumption for complete discover run (greenfield, full mode, 3 rounds UI iteration)
Backward compatibility: discover.json output schema unchanged

non_functional_requirements.target: Claude Code, Codex CLI, OpenCode all execute correctly

mvp_features.name: Mode Detection subagent (F2)
mvp_features.competitive_notes: Codebase scan is pure read-only, ideal for isolation

mvp_features.name: Layer 3 generation subagent (F4)
mvp_features.competitive_notes: Needs full upstream artifact as input; multi-round REVISE adds complexity

mvp_features.name: Artifact Writing subagent (F5)
mvp_features.competitive_notes: Pure file I/O, no user interaction needed

mvp_features.name: Stitch MCP subagent (F6)
mvp_features.competitive_notes: MCP server connection inheritance in subagent process is a risk

mvp_features.name: Context budget guard (F8)
mvp_features.competitive_notes: Measured by testing, not enforced at runtime
